name: A Clareira
short_description: Help Claudinho save the rainforest! A Clareira is a 2D arcade-style Shoot 'em Up with a touch of bullet hell. Play as a brave little cloud putting out wildfires to protect the Amazon. “Clareira” means the heart of the forest — and it needs you!
detailed_description:
Get ready for a thrilling adventure with Claudinho, a brave little cloud fighting to protect the Amazon Rainforest from wildfires!
A Clareira is a colorful 2D shoot 'em up game where you throw raindrops to put out fires and overcome obstacles across increasingly challenging levels.

★ Lovingly crafted by local artists, featuring visuals inspired by the Amazon’s unique wildlife, plants, and culture;
★ Simple and intuitive gameplay with progressive difficulty that challenges reflexes and strategy;
★ Packed with environmental facts to raise awareness in a fun and educational way;
★ Perfect for all ages — easy to pick up, hard to master!

Join Claudinho and help protect the forest — do you have what it takes?

supported_languages: English, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
